data.description:
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding.
Finding: test file inconsistently mixes two Python invocation styles: tests 1 and 5 use inline python3 -c '...' with $TEMPLATE directly interpolated into the Python string, while the behavioral tests (3 and 4) use TEMPLATE env var passed to python3. Harmonize to one style.
File: tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh
Category: maintainability
data.title: [test-ci-llm-review-job]: mixed Python invocation styles (inline vs env var)
